headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 12, 2026**
article:
Shohei Ohtani's impressive on-base streak reached 45 games after he hit a leadoff home run. The Athletics' new home run celebration has drawn attention, featuring Brent Rooker's recent home run. The Baltimore Orioles' Adley Rutschman and Nick Raquet are set to face off against opposing pitchers in a highly anticipated matchup.

Injuries continue to impact several teams. Adley Rutschman has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to left ankle inflammation. Other notable injuries include Joe Boyle's right elbow strain, Danny Young's left elbow reconstruction, Royce Lewis's left knee sprain, Cody Laweryson's right forearm strain, Jeremiah Estrada's right elbow tendenitis, and Jake Meyers's grade two right oblique strain.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Milwaukee Brewers traded Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals traded Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith. The Cardinals also acquired Patrick Galle from the Boston Red Sox. The San Francisco Giants traded Tyler Fitzgerald to the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. The Los Angeles Angels traded Victor Mederos to the Atlanta Braves for future considerations.

top_news.title: Ohtani's leadoff blast sets tone as on-base streak hits 45 games
top_news.summary: Shohei Ohtani hit a leadoff home run, extending his on-base streak to 45 games.

top_news.title: A's new home run celebration is amazing, but also somewhat terrifying
top_news.summary: Athletics' Brent Rooker hits a home run.

top_news.title: Renaissance livens up Cy vs. Cy showdown today
top_news.summary: Renaissance livens up Cy vs. Cy showdown today: Baltimore Orioles' Adley Rutschman and Nick Raquet are set to face off against opposing pitchers.

top_news.title: First-place Bucs capitalize on Cubs' miscue in extras for 'gritty' series win
top_news.summary: Bucs win series with gritty performance, capitalizing on a Cubs miscue in extras.

top_news.title: More history for J-Ram! 3B first Cleveland player with HR vs. other 29 MLB teams
top_news.summary: J-Ram becomes the first Cleveland player to hit a home run against all 29 other MLB teams.

top_news.title: Wacha's 8-inning scoreless gem drops ERA to MLB-best 0.43 mark
top_news.summary: Michael Wacha pitched 8 scoreless innings, lowering his ERA to 0.43.

top_news.title: Lagrange hits 102+ mph NINE times in latest Triple-A start
top_news.summary: Lagrange hits 102+ mph NINE times in latest Triple-A start.

top_news.title: Tatis gets first career start at 2B, helps lead Padres to win
top_news.summary: Padres' Jeremiah Estrada earns win in Padres' victory.
